metadata.description: Comprehensive OBD-II diagnostic trouble code database covering Powertrain (P0xxx-P3xxx), Body (B), Chassis (C), and Network (U) codes

codes.description: Catalyst System Efficiency Below Threshold (Bank 1)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, reduced fuel economy, possible sulfur smell
codes.common_causes: Worn catalytic converter, Faulty oxygen sensor, Exhaust leak, Engine misfire, Fuel system problems
codes.generic_fixes: Inspect oxygen sensors, Check for exhaust leaks, Test catalytic converter efficiency, Scan for additional codes, Verify fuel pressure and injectors

codes.description: System Too Lean (Bank 1)
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, hesitation, poor acceleration, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Vacuum leak, Faulty mass airflow sensor, Weak fuel pump, Clogged fuel filter, Faulty oxygen sensor
codes.generic_fixes: Check for vacuum leaks, Test mass airflow sensor, Verify fuel pressure, Inspect air filter, Clean throttle body

codes.description: Random/Multiple Cylinder Misfire Detected
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, loss of power, vibration, Check Engine Light flashing
codes.common_causes: Worn spark plugs, Bad ignition coils, Low compression, Vacuum leak, Fuel delivery problem
codes.generic_fixes: Replace spark plugs, Test ignition coils, Check fuel injectors, Perform compression test, Inspect for vacuum leaks

codes.description: Cylinder 1 Misfire Detected
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, vibration, loss of power, flashing Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty spark plug (cylinder 1), Bad ignition coil, Fuel injector problem, Low compression, Vacuum leak
codes.generic_fixes: Replace spark plug #1, Test ignition coil #1, Check fuel injector #1, Perform compression test cylinder 1, Swap coils to verify

codes.description: Cylinder 2 Misfire Detected
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, vibration, loss of power, flashing Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty spark plug (cylinder 2), Bad ignition coil, Fuel injector problem, Low compression, Vacuum leak
codes.generic_fixes: Replace spark plug #2, Test ignition coil #2, Check fuel injector #2, Perform compression test cylinder 2, Swap coils to verify

codes.description: Cylinder 3 Misfire Detected
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, vibration, loss of power, flashing Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty spark plug (cylinder 3), Bad ignition coil, Fuel injector problem, Low compression, Vacuum leak
codes.generic_fixes: Replace spark plug #3, Test ignition coil #3, Check fuel injector #3, Perform compression test cylinder 3, Swap coils to verify

codes.description: Cylinder 4 Misfire Detected
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, vibration, loss of power, flashing Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty spark plug (cylinder 4), Bad ignition coil, Fuel injector problem, Low compression, Vacuum leak
codes.generic_fixes: Replace spark plug #4, Test ignition coil #4, Check fuel injector #4, Perform compression test cylinder 4, Swap coils to verify

codes.description: Cylinder 5 Misfire Detected
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, vibration, loss of power, flashing Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty spark plug (cylinder 5), Bad ignition coil, Fuel injector problem, Low compression, Vacuum leak
codes.generic_fixes: Replace spark plug #5, Test ignition coil #5, Check fuel injector #5, Perform compression test cylinder 5, Swap coils to verify

codes.description: Cylinder 6 Misfire Detected
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, vibration, loss of power, flashing Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty spark plug (cylinder 6), Bad ignition coil, Fuel injector problem, Low compression, Vacuum leak
codes.generic_fixes: Replace spark plug #6, Test ignition coil #6, Check fuel injector #6, Perform compression test cylinder 6, Swap coils to verify

codes.description: System Too Rich (Bank 1)
codes.symptoms: Black smoke from exhaust, poor fuel economy, rough idle, strong fuel smell
codes.common_causes: Faulty oxygen sensor, Leaking fuel injector, Excessive fuel pressure, Faulty mass airflow sensor, Clogged air filter
codes.generic_fixes: Test oxygen sensors, Check fuel pressure, Inspect fuel injectors for leaks, Test mass airflow sensor, Replace air filter

codes.description: System Too Lean (Bank 2)
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, hesitation, poor acceleration, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Vacuum leak, Faulty mass airflow sensor, Weak fuel pump, Clogged fuel filter, Faulty oxygen sensor
codes.generic_fixes: Check for vacuum leaks, Test mass airflow sensor, Verify fuel pressure, Inspect air filter, Clean throttle body

codes.description: System Too Rich (Bank 2)
codes.symptoms: Black smoke from exhaust, poor fuel economy, rough idle, strong fuel smell
codes.common_causes: Faulty oxygen sensor, Leaking fuel injector, Excessive fuel pressure, Faulty mass airflow sensor, Clogged air filter
codes.generic_fixes: Test oxygen sensors, Check fuel pressure, Inspect fuel injectors for leaks, Test mass airflow sensor, Replace air filter

codes.description: Exhaust Gas Recirculation (EGR) Flow Insufficient
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, possible pinging or knocking under load, failed emissions test
codes.common_causes: Clogged EGR passages, Faulty EGR valve, Carbon buildup, EGR solenoid failure, Vacuum hose leak
codes.generic_fixes: Clean EGR valve and passages, Test EGR solenoid, Check vacuum lines, Inspect EGR valve operation, Remove carbon deposits

codes.description: Exhaust Gas Recirculation (EGR) Flow Excessive
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, stalling, hesitation, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Stuck open EGR valve, Faulty EGR solenoid, Carbon buildup preventing valve closure, EGR valve position sensor fault
codes.generic_fixes: Inspect EGR valve for proper closure, Test EGR solenoid, Clean EGR valve, Check EGR position sensor, Replace EGR valve if stuck

codes.description: Catalyst System Efficiency Below Threshold (Bank 2)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, reduced fuel economy, possible sulfur smell
codes.common_causes: Worn catalytic converter, Faulty oxygen sensor, Exhaust leak, Engine misfire, Fuel system problems
codes.generic_fixes: Inspect oxygen sensors, Check for exhaust leaks, Test catalytic converter efficiency, Scan for additional codes, Verify fuel pressure

codes.description: Evaporative Emission System Leak Detected (Small Leak)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, possible fuel smell
codes.common_causes: Loose or damaged gas cap, Cracked EVAP hose, Faulty purge valve, Leaking fuel tank, Faulty vent valve
codes.generic_fixes: Tighten or replace gas cap, Inspect EVAP hoses, Test purge valve, Check for fuel leaks, Perform smoke test

codes.description: Evaporative Emission Purge Control Valve Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, possible rough idle
codes.common_causes: Faulty purge valve, Broken wiring, Corroded connector, Short circuit, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Test purge valve operation, Check wiring and connectors, Test purge valve circuit, Replace purge valve if faulty, Verify ECM grounds

codes.description: Evaporative Emission System Leak Detected (Large Leak)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, strong fuel smell
codes.common_causes: Missing or loose gas cap, Cracked EVAP hose, Damaged fuel tank, Faulty purge valve, Leaking fuel filler neck
codes.generic_fixes: Check gas cap, Inspect all EVAP hoses, Examine fuel tank for damage, Test purge and vent valves, Perform smoke test

codes.description: Vehicle Speed Sensor (VSS) Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Speedometer not working, transmission shifting issues, Check Engine Light, cruise control not working
codes.common_causes: Faulty vehicle speed sensor, Broken speedometer cable, Wiring problem, Bad wheel speed sensor, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Test vehicle speed sensor, Check wiring and connectors, Inspect speedometer cable, Test wheel speed sensors, Verify ECM communication

codes.description: Idle Air Control (IAC) System Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Erratic idle, stalling, high idle, engine dies when stopping
codes.common_causes: Dirty idle air control valve, Carbon buildup in throttle body, Faulty IAC valve, Vacuum leak, Wiring problem
codes.generic_fixes: Clean idle air control valve, Clean throttle body, Test IAC valve operation, Check for vacuum leaks, Inspect IAC wiring

codes.description: System Voltage Low
codes.symptoms: Dim lights, electrical issues, difficult starting, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Weak battery, Faulty alternator, Corroded battery terminals, Loose drive belt, Bad voltage regulator
codes.generic_fixes: Test battery voltage, Check alternator output, Clean battery terminals, Inspect alternator belt, Test voltage regulator

codes.description: Internal Control Module Memory Check Sum Error
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, poor performance, no start, erratic behavior
codes.common_causes: ECM/PCM failure, Software corruption, Low battery voltage during reprogramming, Electrical spike damage
codes.generic_fixes: Reprogram ECM/PCM, Check all ECM grounds, Test ECM power supply, Replace ECM if faulty, Verify battery voltage

codes.description: Transmission Control System Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, transmission shifting problems, limp mode
codes.common_causes: Transmission control module fault, Wiring issues, Transmission mechanical problem, Shift solenoid failure, Low transmission fluid
codes.generic_fixes: Scan for transmission-specific codes, Check transmission fluid level, Inspect wiring, Test shift solenoids, Diagnose TCM

codes.description: Input/Turbine Speed Sensor Circuit No Signal
codes.symptoms: Transmission won't shift, speedometer issues, Check Engine Light, limp mode
codes.common_causes: Faulty input speed sensor, Broken sensor wiring, Corroded connector, TCM fault, Transmission mechanical damage
codes.generic_fixes: Test input speed sensor, Check sensor wiring, Inspect connector, Verify TCM operation, Check transmission fluid level

codes.description: Torque Converter Clutch Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Poor fuel economy, transmission slipping, overheating, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty torque converter, Bad TCC solenoid, Wiring problem, Low transmission fluid, Valve body issue
codes.generic_fixes: Check transmission fluid level and condition, Test TCC solenoid, Inspect wiring, Perform transmission pressure test, Replace torque converter if needed

codes.description: HO2S Insufficient Switching Bank 1 Sensor 1
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, poor fuel economy, rough idle
codes.common_causes: Worn oxygen sensor, Exhaust leak near sensor, Contaminated sensor, Wiring problem, Fuel system issue
codes.generic_fixes: Replace oxygen sensor, Check for exhaust leaks, Inspect sensor wiring, Test fuel pressure, Verify sensor heater operation

codes.description: Post Catalyst Fuel Trim System Too Lean (Bank 1)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, rough idle, poor acceleration
codes.common_causes: Exhaust leak after catalytic converter, Faulty downstream oxygen sensor, Vacuum leak, Weak fuel pump, Air injection system problem
codes.generic_fixes: Check for exhaust leaks, Test downstream oxygen sensor, Inspect for vacuum leaks, Verify fuel pressure, Check air injection system

codes.description: Post Catalyst Fuel Trim System Too Rich (Bank 1)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, black smoke, poor fuel economy
codes.common_causes: Faulty downstream oxygen sensor, Excessive fuel pressure, Leaking fuel injector, Faulty mass airflow sensor
codes.generic_fixes: Test downstream oxygen sensor, Check fuel pressure, Inspect fuel injectors, Test mass airflow sensor, Check for carbon buildup

codes.description: HO2S Heater Control Circuit (Bank 1 Sensor 2)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, increased emissions, possible rough idle when cold
codes.common_causes: Faulty oxygen sensor heater, Blown fuse, Broken wiring, Bad relay, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Test oxygen sensor heater circuit, Check fuses and relays, Inspect wiring, Test sensor resistance, Replace oxygen sensor if faulty

codes.description: Mass Air Flow (MAF) Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Hard starting, stalling, rough idle, poor acceleration, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Dirty or faulty MAF sensor, Wiring problem, Air leak after MAF, Damaged air filter, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Clean MAF sensor, Check MAF wiring, Inspect for air leaks, Replace air filter, Test MAF voltage output

codes.description: Mass Air Flow (MAF) Circuit Range/Performance
codes.symptoms: Poor acceleration, rough idle, stalling, black smoke, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Dirty MAF sensor, Air leak, Restricted air filter, Faulty MAF sensor, Intake manifold leak
codes.generic_fixes: Clean MAF sensor with proper cleaner, Check for air leaks, Replace air filter, Verify MAF readings with scanner, Replace MAF if out of range

codes.description: Mass Air Flow (MAF) Circuit Low Input
codes.symptoms: Hard starting, poor idle, lack of power, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty MAF sensor, Wiring short to ground, Air leak before MAF, Dirty MAF sensor, ECM problem
codes.generic_fixes: Test MAF sensor voltage, Check wiring for shorts, Clean MAF sensor, Inspect for air leaks, Replace MAF sensor if faulty

codes.description: Mass Air Flow (MAF) Circuit High Input
codes.symptoms: Black smoke, rough idle, stalling, poor fuel economy, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty MAF sensor, Wiring short to power, Restricted air filter, Large vacuum leak, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Test MAF sensor voltage, Check wiring for shorts to power, Replace air filter, Check for vacuum leaks, Replace MAF if readings too high

codes.description: Intake Air Temperature (IAT) Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, poor performance when cold or hot, hard starting
codes.common_causes: Faulty IAT sensor, Wiring problem, Corroded connector, Short circuit, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Test IAT sensor resistance, Check IAT wiring, Clean sensor connector, Replace IAT sensor if faulty, Verify ECM grounds

codes.description: Intake Air Temperature (IAT) Circuit High Input
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, hard starting, poor cold weather performance
codes.common_causes: Faulty IAT sensor, Open circuit, Broken wiring, Poor connection, IAT sensor unplugged
codes.generic_fixes: Test IAT sensor resistance, Check for open circuits, Inspect wiring and connector, Replace IAT sensor, Verify sensor is properly connected

codes.description: Engine Coolant Temperature (ECT) Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Engine won't reach normal temperature, overheating, poor fuel economy, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty coolant temperature sensor, Wiring problem, Corroded connector, Stuck thermostat, Low coolant level
codes.generic_fixes: Test ECT sensor resistance, Check ECT wiring, Inspect connector, Replace thermostat, Check coolant level

codes.description: Engine Coolant Temperature (ECT) Circuit Range/Performance
codes.symptoms: Engine takes long to warm up or overheats, Check Engine Light, poor fuel economy
codes.common_causes: Stuck open thermostat, Faulty coolant temperature sensor, Low coolant, Cooling fan always on, Wiring issue
codes.generic_fixes: Replace thermostat, Test coolant temperature sensor, Check coolant level, Verify cooling fan operation, Inspect ECT wiring

codes.description: Engine Coolant Temperature (ECT) Circuit Low Input
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, engine runs rich, poor fuel economy, may not start when cold
codes.common_causes: Short to ground in ECT circuit, Faulty coolant temperature sensor, Wiring problem, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Test ECT sensor resistance, Check for shorts to ground, Inspect ECT wiring, Replace coolant temperature sensor, Verify ECM operation

codes.description: Engine Coolant Temperature (ECT) Circuit High Input
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, hard starting, engine runs lean, poor performance
codes.common_causes: Open circuit, Faulty coolant temperature sensor, Broken wiring, Poor connector, ECT sensor unplugged
codes.generic_fixes: Test ECT sensor resistance, Check for open circuits, Inspect connector, Replace coolant temperature sensor, Verify sensor is plugged in

codes.description: Throttle Position Sensor/Switch Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Poor acceleration, stalling, erratic idle, Check Engine Light, limp mode
codes.common_causes: Faulty throttle position sensor, Wiring problem, Corroded connector, Bad throttle body, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Test TPS voltage, Clean throttle body, Check TPS wiring, Replace throttle position sensor, Calibrate TPS

codes.description: Throttle Position Sensor/Switch Circuit Range/Performance
codes.symptoms: Hesitation, stalling, poor acceleration, limp mode, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty TPS, Dirty throttle body, Carbon buildup, TPS misadjustment, Wiring issue
codes.generic_fixes: Clean throttle body thoroughly, Test TPS readings with scanner, Adjust or replace TPS, Check TPS wiring, Perform TPS relearn procedure

codes.description: Throttle Position Sensor/Switch Circuit Low Input
codes.symptoms: Engine won't rev, limp mode, stalling, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Short to ground in TPS circuit, Faulty TPS, Wiring problem, Bad throttle body, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Test TPS voltage, Check for shorts to ground, Inspect TPS wiring, Replace throttle position sensor, Test throttle body

codes.description: Throttle Position Sensor/Switch Circuit High Input
codes.symptoms: High idle, poor fuel economy, lack of power, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Open circuit, Faulty TPS, Broken wiring, Loose connector, TPS unplugged
codes.generic_fixes: Test TPS voltage, Check for open circuits, Inspect connector, Replace throttle position sensor, Verify TPS is plugged in

codes.description: Insufficient Coolant Temperature for Closed Loop Fuel Control
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, poor fuel economy, engine takes long to warm up
codes.common_causes: Stuck open thermostat, Faulty coolant temperature sensor, Low coolant, Cooling system problem, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Replace thermostat, Test coolant temperature sensor, Check coolant level, Verify proper coolant mixture, Inspect cooling system

codes.description: Coolant Thermostat (Coolant Temperature Below Thermostat Regulating Temperature)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, poor heater performance, poor fuel economy, engine runs cool
codes.common_causes: Stuck open thermostat, Faulty coolant temperature sensor, Low coolant, Cooling fan always on, Incorrect thermostat installed
codes.generic_fixes: Replace thermostat, Test coolant temperature sensor, Check coolant level, Verify cooling fan operation, Install correct thermostat rating

codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Low Voltage (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, poor fuel economy, rough idle, engine runs rich
codes.common_causes: Faulty oxygen sensor, Exhaust leak near sensor, Short to ground, Wiring problem, Contaminated sensor
codes.generic_fixes: Replace oxygen sensor, Check for exhaust leaks, Inspect wiring for shorts, Clean sensor if possible, Verify sensor heater operation

codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit High Voltage (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, poor fuel economy, rough idle, engine runs lean
codes.common_causes: Faulty oxygen sensor, Short to power, Exhaust leak, Fuel pressure too high, Contaminated sensor
codes.generic_fixes: Replace oxygen sensor, Check wiring for shorts to power, Inspect for exhaust leaks, Test fuel pressure, Clean or replace sensor

codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Slow Response (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, poor fuel economy, sluggish acceleration
codes.common_causes: Worn oxygen sensor, Contaminated sensor, Exhaust leak, Wiring problem, Fuel system issue
codes.generic_fixes: Replace oxygen sensor, Check for exhaust leaks near sensor, Inspect sensor wiring, Test fuel pressure and injectors, Verify sensor heater operation

codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit No Activity Detected (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, poor fuel economy, rough idle
codes.common_causes: Faulty oxygen sensor, Open circuit, Blown fuse, Wiring problem, Failed sensor heater
codes.generic_fixes: Replace oxygen sensor, Check fuses, Test sensor heater circuit, Inspect wiring, Verify sensor power and ground

codes.description: O2 Sensor Heater Circuit Malfunction (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, possible rough idle when cold, increased emissions
codes.common_causes: Faulty oxygen sensor heater, Blown fuse, Wiring problem, Bad relay, Open circuit
codes.generic_fixes: Test sensor heater resistance, Check fuses and relays, Inspect heater circuit wiring, Replace oxygen sensor, Verify power supply

codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Malfunction (Bank 1 Sensor 2)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, may affect fuel economy
codes.common_causes: Faulty downstream oxygen sensor, Wiring problem, Exhaust leak, Corroded connector, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Replace downstream oxygen sensor, Check sensor wiring, Inspect for exhaust leaks, Clean connector, Test sensor voltage

codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Low Voltage (Bank 1 Sensor 2)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, possible catalyst efficiency issues
codes.common_causes: Faulty downstream oxygen sensor, Short to ground, Wiring problem, Exhaust leak after catalyst
codes.generic_fixes: Replace downstream oxygen sensor, Check wiring for shorts, Inspect for exhaust leaks, Test sensor voltage, Clean sensor connector

codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit High Voltage (Bank 1 Sensor 2)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, possible catalyst efficiency issues
codes.common_causes: Faulty downstream oxygen sensor, Short to power, Wiring problem, Exhaust leak after catalyst
codes.generic_fixes: Replace downstream oxygen sensor, Check wiring for shorts to power, Inspect for exhaust leaks, Test sensor voltage

codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit No Activity Detected (Bank 1 Sensor 2)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, catalyst monitoring disabled
codes.common_causes: Faulty downstream oxygen sensor, Open circuit, Blown fuse, Wiring problem, Failed sensor heater
codes.generic_fixes: Replace downstream oxygen sensor, Check fuses, Test wiring, Verify sensor heater operation, Check power and ground

codes.description: O2 Sensor Heater Circuit Malfunction (Bank 1 Sensor 2)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, possible increased emissions
codes.common_causes: Faulty oxygen sensor heater, Blown fuse, Wiring problem, Bad relay, Open circuit
codes.generic_fixes: Test sensor heater resistance, Check fuses and relays, Inspect heater wiring, Replace downstream oxygen sensor, Verify power supply

codes.description: Injector Circuit Malfunction - Cylinder 1
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, misfire cylinder 1, poor performance, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty fuel injector, Wiring problem, Corroded connector, ECM driver fault, Short or open circuit
codes.generic_fixes: Test fuel injector resistance, Check injector wiring, Swap injectors to verify, Clean or replace injector #1, Test ECM injector driver

codes.description: Injector Circuit Malfunction - Cylinder 2
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, misfire cylinder 2, poor performance, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty fuel injector, Wiring problem, Corroded connector, ECM driver fault, Short or open circuit
codes.generic_fixes: Test fuel injector resistance, Check injector wiring, Swap injectors to verify, Clean or replace injector #2, Test ECM injector driver

codes.description: Injector Circuit Malfunction - Cylinder 3
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, misfire cylinder 3, poor performance, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty fuel injector, Wiring problem, Corroded connector, ECM driver fault, Short or open circuit
codes.generic_fixes: Test fuel injector resistance, Check injector wiring, Swap injectors to verify, Clean or replace injector #3, Test ECM injector driver

codes.description: Injector Circuit Malfunction - Cylinder 4
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, misfire cylinder 4, poor performance, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty fuel injector, Wiring problem, Corroded connector, ECM driver fault, Short or open circuit
codes.generic_fixes: Test fuel injector resistance, Check injector wiring, Swap injectors to verify, Clean or replace injector #4, Test ECM injector driver

codes.description: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch B Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Poor acceleration, limp mode, stalling, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty accelerator pedal position sensor, Wiring problem, Corroded connector, Throttle body fault, ECM issue
codes.generic_fixes: Test accelerator pedal sensor voltage, Clean throttle body, Check sensor wiring, Replace pedal position sensor, Perform relearn procedure

codes.description: Engine Overboost Condition (Turbocharger/Supercharger)
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, loss of power, limp mode, possible engine knock
codes.common_causes: Faulty wastegate, Stuck wastegate actuator, Boost control solenoid failure, Boost leak, Faulty boost pressure sensor
codes.generic_fixes: Test wastegate operation, Check boost control solenoid, Inspect for boost leaks, Replace boost pressure sensor, Verify turbo operation

codes.description: Turbocharger/Supercharger Underboost Condition
codes.symptoms: Lack of power, sluggish acceleration, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Boost leak, Faulty turbocharger, Stuck wastegate, Clogged air filter, Exhaust restriction, Faulty boost sensor
codes.generic_fixes: Check for boost leaks, Inspect turbocharger, Test wastegate operation, Replace air filter, Check exhaust for restrictions, Test boost sensor

codes.description: Crankshaft Position Sensor A Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: No start, stalling, rough idle, Check Engine Light, intermittent starting
codes.common_causes: Faulty crankshaft position sensor, Wiring problem, Loose sensor, Damaged reluctor wheel, Excessive air gap, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Replace crankshaft position sensor, Check sensor wiring, Verify sensor mounting, Inspect reluctor wheel, Adjust air gap, Test ECM

codes.description: Crankshaft Position Sensor A Circuit Range/Performance
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, hesitation, poor acceleration, stalling, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Worn crankshaft position sensor, Damaged reluctor wheel, Excessive air gap, Timing chain/belt worn, Wiring issue
codes.generic_fixes: Replace crankshaft position sensor, Inspect reluctor wheel, Check timing chain/belt, Adjust sensor air gap, Test sensor signal

codes.description: Camshaft Position Sensor Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: No start, stalling, rough idle, Check Engine Light, poor performance
codes.common_causes: Faulty camshaft position sensor, Wiring problem, Loose sensor, Damaged reluctor wheel, Timing problem, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Replace camshaft position sensor, Check sensor wiring, Verify sensor mounting, Inspect timing, Test sensor signal, Verify reluctor wheel

codes.description: Camshaft Position Sensor Circuit Range/Performance
codes.symptoms: Rough idle, poor performance, stalling, Check Engine Light, hard starting
codes.common_causes: Worn camshaft position sensor, Timing chain/belt worn or jumped, Damaged reluctor wheel, Wiring issue, Oil contamination
codes.generic_fixes: Replace camshaft position sensor, Verify timing chain/belt position, Inspect reluctor wheel, Check sensor wiring, Clean sensor area

codes.description: Ignition Coil Primary/Secondary Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Misfire, rough idle, poor acceleration, Check Engine Light
codes.common_causes: Faulty ignition coil, Wiring problem, Bad spark plug, Short circuit, ECM driver fault
codes.generic_fixes: Test ignition coil resistance, Check coil wiring, Replace spark plugs, Test coil primary/secondary circuits, Swap coils to verify

codes.description: Ignition Coil A Primary/Secondary Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Misfire cylinder 1, rough idle, Check Engine Light flashing
codes.common_causes: Faulty ignition coil, Wiring problem, Bad spark plug, Short circuit, ECM driver fault
codes.generic_fixes: Replace ignition coil #1, Test coil resistance, Check coil wiring, Replace spark plug #1, Swap coils to verify

codes.description: Ignition Coil B Primary/Secondary Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Misfire cylinder 2, rough idle, Check Engine Light flashing
codes.common_causes: Faulty ignition coil, Wiring problem, Bad spark plug, Short circuit, ECM driver fault
codes.generic_fixes: Replace ignition coil #2, Test coil resistance, Check coil wiring, Replace spark plug #2, Swap coils to verify

codes.description: Ignition Coil C Primary/Secondary Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Misfire cylinder 3, rough idle, Check Engine Light flashing
codes.common_causes: Faulty ignition coil, Wiring problem, Bad spark plug, Short circuit, ECM driver fault
codes.generic_fixes: Replace ignition coil #3, Test coil resistance, Check coil wiring, Replace spark plug #3, Swap coils to verify

codes.description: Ignition Coil D Primary/Secondary Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Misfire cylinder 4, rough idle, Check Engine Light flashing
codes.common_causes: Faulty ignition coil, Wiring problem, Bad spark plug, Short circuit, ECM driver fault
codes.generic_fixes: Replace ignition coil #4, Test coil resistance, Check coil wiring, Replace spark plug #4, Swap coils to verify

codes.description: Exhaust Gas Recirculation (EGR) Flow Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, possible rough idle, failed emissions test
codes.common_causes: Clogged EGR passages, Faulty EGR valve, Bad EGR solenoid, Carbon buildup, Vacuum leak
codes.generic_fixes: Clean EGR valve and passages, Test EGR valve operation, Check EGR solenoid, Inspect vacuum lines, Remove carbon deposits

codes.description: Exhaust Gas Recirculation (EGR) Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, possible rough idle or stalling
codes.common_causes: Faulty EGR solenoid, Wiring problem, Corroded connector, Short circuit, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Test EGR solenoid operation, Check solenoid wiring, Clean connector, Replace EGR solenoid, Verify ECM grounds

codes.description: Exhaust Gas Recirculation (EGR) Circuit Range/Performance
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, rough idle, stalling, hesitation
codes.common_causes: Carbon buildup in EGR system, Faulty EGR valve, Bad position sensor, Vacuum leak, Clogged passages
codes.generic_fixes: Clean EGR valve and passages, Test EGR position sensor, Check vacuum system, Replace EGR valve, Remove carbon deposits

codes.description: Exhaust Gas Recirculation (EGR) Sensor A Circuit Low
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, possible rough idle
codes.common_causes: Faulty EGR position sensor, Short to ground, Wiring problem, Bad EGR valve, ECM fault
codes.generic_fixes: Test EGR position sensor, Check wiring for shorts, Clean sensor, Replace EGR valve assembly, Verify ECM operation

codes.description: Exhaust Gas Recirculation (EGR) Sensor A Circuit High
codes.symptoms: Check Engine Light, possible rough idle

codes.symptoms: Gauges not working, Check Engine Light, warning lights not functioning
codes.common_causes: IPC failure, CAN bus problem, Wiring issue, Power supply problem, Corroded connector
codes.generic_fixes: Check IPC power and ground, Test CAN bus circuits, Inspect connectors, Verify IPC operation, Replace instrument cluster if faulty
